judge_score.justification: An excellent, near-comprehensive response that accurately identifies and explains the key debugging concerns for Feb 29th and midnight UTC edge cases, with practical code examples, a useful diagnostic checklist, and insightful coverage of how the two issues can interact through timezone conversions.

A well-structured and comprehensive response that correctly identifies the core issues with duplicates in sorting, though the initial characterization of the Lomuto partition bug is slightly misleading — using `<` doesn't produce incorrect results, it produces poor performance with many duplicates. The 3-way partition solution and debugging checklist are excellent additions.

An outstanding, production-quality diagnostic response that systematically covers the major categories of time zone-related crash causes with accurate, concrete code examples across platforms, complemented by practical debugging and prevention guidance. One of the most thorough and well-organized answers possible for this question.

An outstanding, near-perfect response that accurately identifies and explains all major reasons string validation fails on emoji while passing ASCII, with correct code examples across multiple languages and practical, actionable fixes. The structure and visual aids make it highly accessible.

An outstanding response that systematically dissects both the leap year and midnight UTC issues with accurate technical detail, practical code examples, and excellent structure. The compound bug analysis showing how the two issues interact is particularly valuable, and the response goes beyond diagnosis to provide clear fix patterns.

A well-organized and comprehensive response that correctly identifies the most common causes of sorting failures with duplicates. Minor technical inaccuracy regarding the Lomuto partition behavior, but overall an excellent diagnostic guide.

An outstanding, expert-level diagnostic guide that accurately covers the full spectrum of causes for timezone-change crashes, with platform-specific details, realistic code examples, and excellent organization. The response goes well beyond a simple list of causes to provide a genuinely useful troubleshooting framework.
